content: ICM curiosity-driven exploration in 2025 autonomous agents can be intentionally constrained by the 3–5 chunk working memory capacity limit to produce more focused, high-quality reasoning, rather than encouraging unconstrained novelty-seeking. This intentionally bottlenecked curiosity avoids the common failure mode of autonomous agents wandering to trivial low-complexity novel states while leveraging intrinsic motivation to deepen reasoning on prioritized chunks.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
